plugins.name: cabinet-of-imd
plugins.description: The Cabinet of IMD Agents — a crew of 8 college classmates who serve as specialized web development agents. Vault-native Markdown chatter, lazy character loading, organic personality, gated handoffs, Obsidian integration, and a /dream command for deep vault analysis.
